holdings.infoBox: LTL is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Communication Services (LTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund provides 2x exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US fixed-line and mobile telephone companies. LTL was launched on Mar 27, 2008 and is issued by ProShares.
